reddit.notes: Primary — highest density of unguarded IT pain from business owners. r/smallbusiness is the richest subreddit.

linkedin.notes: MSP owners post BD pain on LinkedIn. Business owners post IT frustrations openly.

facebook.notes: MSP-specific Facebook groups and small business communities

hubspot.notes: Set portal_id and sequence_id per client. Urgent prospects (security incidents) should be placed in a priority sequence.

calendly.notes: Discovery call CTAs. Urgent security incident prospects get a same-day calendar link.
